microsoft_ft: Architected and delivered **tailored technical narratives** for partner integrations with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp, translating complex Azure resilience workflows into prospect-ready stories that secured $14M+ in enterprise impact.

Led **0→1 build** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled a 2-person operation into a platformized, multi-team system.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects that informed million-dollar infrastructure decisions.

Served as technical bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, establishing credibility with senior IT and engineering stakeholders across 14 cross-org recovery executions.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning that cut planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating hands-on fluency with LLM-powered workflow automation and data-driven process optimization.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by running hands-on demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, surfacing feature gaps through 11+ discovery interviews that directly shaped the product roadmap.

Translated user research into actionable **roadmap influence**, championing intent-based YAML generation as a priority feature after identifying it as the top unmet need across engineering stakeholders — mirroring a pre-sales discovery-to-champion motion.

Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling scientists and engineers to query experimental history faster.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in revenue — validated through structured discovery with 20+ service teams.

Conducted **workflow discovery** with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly paralleling pre-sales POC and technical workshop execution.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a real-time reference architecture to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating comfort across complex multi-source data systems and regulated environments.
Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% through structured cross-functional coordination.

Prioritized a backlog of **40+ high-priority tickets** via Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake process and modeling the structured workshop facilitation Invert prospects require.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by overhauling end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process — building early fluency in GTM operations and customer-facing technical workflow design.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence to build inbound pipeline against entrenched local incumbents.

Conducted **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering data-driven pricing model improvements to leadership — an early analog to feeding prospect needs back to product.

'Discovery-to-champion' motion and 'feed prospect needs back to product' from the JD — surfaced in microsoft_2023 bullet 2 and pro_painters bullet 3 respectively.
